name: Existing Claim - Satisfied Quick Close
description: Caller's question is answered and they don't need a transfer.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: I just wanted to make sure my claim was received - I have the confirmation email. That's really all I needed.
expectedOutcome: Agent confirms the caller is satisfied, gives a brief reassurance about timelines (24 business hours, monitor email), and closes the call quickly (30-60 sec) without an unnecessary transfer.
